```{=html}
<div style="width:80%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.4em 0.7em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
   <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
   <span style="margin-left:0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">deploy-staging/SKILL.md</span>
  </div>

  <div style="padding:0.95em 1.2em 1.1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.65;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;">
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">## Steps</div>
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">…</div>
   <div style="background:rgba(255,111,142,0.12);margin:0.5em -1.2em;padding:0.4em 1.2em;border-left:3px solid #FF6F8E;color:#FF6F8E;font-weight:700;">## Gotchas</div>
   <div style="color:#F8F7F0;">- migration must finish <span style="color:#FF6F8E;">BEFORE</span> API redeploys</div>
   <div style="color:#F8F7F0;">- <span style="color:#FFB84D;">npm build</span> succeeds even if env vars missing</div>
   <div style="color:#F8F7F0;">- CDN purge takes <span style="color:#FFB84D;">90s</span></div>
   <div style="color:#F8F7F0;">- don't claim done until smoke test passes</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  difference between "kind of works" and <strong style="color:#C4881A;font-style:normal;">actually reliable</strong>
 </div>

</div>
```
